response.original_title: 一般男女モニタリングAV マジックミラーの向こうには大好きな彼女！他の男に寝取られる姿を彼氏が最後まで見ることができたら100万円！巨乳の彼女は“30cm横で彼氏に見られている”とは知らずに彼氏とは比べ物にならない巨根にオマ○コ本気濡れ！そのままデカチンと初めての寝取られ中出しセックスしてしまうのか!?
response.overview: A couple takes part in a secret monitoring show where the girlfriend is completely unaware that her boyfriend is watching from just 30cm away. As a stranger approaches with the challenge — one million yen if he can watch her give in to another man until the end — the big-breasted amateur begins to respond to an arousal she cannot suppress. Her body reacts to a penis far larger than her boyfriend's, and despite her partner watching every moment, she becomes increasingly overwhelmed by the experience.
response.tagline: 1 million yen if your boyfriend watches his girlfriend get taken by another man.
response.title: Male-Female Monitoring AV - 1 Million Yen Cuckold Challenge
